title: Update default ESP32 IP address to 192.168.43.148

requirements.summary: Change the default ESP32 polling URL from http://192.168.4.1/data to http://192.168.43.148/data in the useESP32Connection hook
acceptanceCriteria: The default ESP32 URL constant in useESP32Connection.ts is set to http://192.168.43.148/data
On first load (no localStorage entry), the app polls http://192.168.43.148/data
The Settings panel pre-fills with http://192.168.43.148/data when no custom URL has been saved
Existing localStorage-saved URLs continue to take precedence over the new default

file_operations.description: Update the default ESP32 device URL constant from 'http://192.168.4.1/data' to 'http://192.168.43.148/data'. Ensure this default is used when no URL has been saved to localStorage, and that the new default is returned by getDeviceUrl() when localStorage is empty. Verify that existing saved URLs in localStorage continue to take precedence over the new default.
